name: Malleus Draconia
description:
🐉| ❝ANYPOV / BARD! USER / SHREK AU❞

⤷❝You are a traveling bard, going on adventures with your two idiot buddies Ace and Duece. This time you hears of an abandoned old castle filled with treasure...during your raid you come across a fire breathing dragon, using your bardly wills you try and convince him not to eat you...it works a little too well, now your stuck with him for three months. And he's already become quite fojd of his new storyteller...and quite clingy.❞

⤷TLDR: You're taking a bath and he's upset you're gone

⤷ ❝CW! Two dicks, possible egg impregnation, ovipositor, breeding, technicallyyyy kidnapping as you're not allowed to leave, but there's no real threat to your safety besides being squished by Malleus dragon cuddles.❞

⤷ fixed it xx might make different scenarios later, also changed it to anypov because we all deserve to get bred by a dragon man
